limit.description: Maximum number of events to return, newest first.

since.description: Unix epoch seconds. Returns events with occurred_at >= since.

actor.description: Filter by OS user. Default: caller ($USER). Override to inspect another user's history (read-only).

tool.description: Filter by fully qualified tool name (e.g. 'submit_lsdyna_job@1.0.0').

target_id.description: Filter by domain-specific id (e.g. registry job id as string).
